meta.notes: Phase 1 draft technical requirements/design. Hosting and stack depend on assumptions/open questions. | Phase 2: updated architecture notes using confirmed runtime approach.

purpose: Describe the intended technical architecture and hosting for the Gut–Brain Simulator web app in a build-ready way (without writing production code).

architecture_overview.summary: Client-first web app with deterministic simulation module and a thin persistence layer for runs/exports. Pilot dataset visualization is performed client-side from a bundled or uploaded CSV.

components.name: Simulation Engine
components.notes: Confirmed OQ-001/OQ-002: frozen regression artifacts (JSON) and deterministic execution; supports loading replacement artifacts via hidden admin controls.

evidence.snippet: This approach allows for simulation of how changes in diet propagate through biological systems  and influence cognitive outcomes.

- **Pilot Results (n=66)**: upload/select the real CSV → auto-generate charts and a clean summary table.   - **Simulator**: nutrient inputs (manual or FoodData Central lookup) → predicted microbiome s

alternatives: Local hosting on a laptop for offline judging
hosting_choice.notes: Confirmed primary choice Lovable-hosted web app (ASM-001).

external_dependencies.name: Charts library
external_dependencies.notes: cannot confirm; likely Recharts or similar.

external_dependencies.name: CSV parsing
external_dependencies.notes: cannot confirm; choose a deterministic CSV parser.

data_storage.notes: assumption ASM-001; can be omitted for fully client-side demo if persistence is not needed.

ai_usage.runtime_ai: None required at runtime; simulator uses frozen model artifacts (JSON) executed deterministically client-side or in a thin API layer.
ai_usage.devtime_ai: Agentic workflows (Cursor/Lovable prompts) with gates defined in SRS/agentic_prompt_gates.json.
ai_usage.notes: blocked by OQ-008 if evidence assistant is desired.

ops_considerations.observability: Basic client error logging and export failure reporting; no heavy telemetry required.
ops_considerations.backups: If Supabase used, export runs/exports for backup.
ops_considerations.data_privacy: Do not store PII; treat pilot dataset as sensitive even if de-identified.
ops_considerations.notes: Minimal ops due to science-fair scope.
